source.authority: Federal Ministry of Justice and Federal Office of Justice
source.scope: Official-source-backed Germany assessment-year 2026 individual and joint spouse-splitting income-tax tariff.

DE.notes: Section 32a tariff for individual assessment and the statutory spouse-splitting procedure on caller-confirmed taxable income. Solidarity surcharge, church tax, child comparison and special-rate income remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Assessment-year 2026 individual and joint spouse-splitting tariff income tax on caller-confirmed taxable income.
